articles.description: Circle, the issuer of USDC, the second-largest stablecoin, is set to launch a global payments and cross-border remittance network on April 22, 2025

articles.title: Incoming SEC Chair to Weigh More Than 70 Crypto ETF Filings—Including Solana and XRP
articles.description: Spot crypto ETFs are currently limited to Bitcoin and Ethereum in the U. S. , but analysts expect new approvals this year.

articles.title: Consensys, Solana, and Uniswap CEO donated to Trump's $239M inauguration fund
articles.description: New filings from the Federal Election Commission (FEC) reveal that several cryptocurrency firms and their executives made significant contributions to US President Donald Trump’s inauguration fund after the results of the 2024 election. According to FEC filings made public on April 20 by the Trump-Vance Inaugural Committee, Uniswap CEO Hayden Adams donated more than $245,000, Solana Labs donated $1 million, and software firm Consensys sent $100,000 in January 2025 to support the then-president-e

articles.title: Galaxy Digital Withdraws $95 Million in SOL from Exchanges
articles.description: Galaxy Digital increases SOL holdings, withdrawing $95 million from crypto exchanges, affecting Solana's market dynamics.

articles.title: Is ETH Still Special?
articles.description: We are never shy about holding ETH to account as crypto's second largest asset and the DeFi intuition gateway for traditional investors. But mainstream adoption requires a growth story, and so far this year ETH is (put kindly) failing to lead. ETH sits in 16th place in the CoinDesk 20 YTD performance leaderboard, down 53%. Going back a year, the numbers look similar: 15th place and down 50%

articles.title: Deutsche Bank and Standard Chartered, in Consortium, Explore U.S. Expansion for Bitcoin Services
articles.description: Deutsche Bank, valued at $900 billion, and Standard Chartered, with a valuation of $300 billion, are part of a consortium of banks exploring the expansion of their cryptocurrency operations into the United States, according to a report by the Wall Street Journal

articles.title: Bitcoiner PlanB slams ETH: ‘centralized & premined’ shitcoin
articles.description: Pseudonymous Bitcoin stock-to-flow (S2F) model creator PlanB attacked Ethereum and mocked the project’s co-founder, Vitalik Buterin. PlanB mockingly reposted a June 2022 X post by Buterin in which the Ethereum co-founder said S2F “is really not looking good now. ” PlanB responded with a new posting stating, “Ethereum is really not looking good now

articles.title: Trump attacks FED
articles.description: President Trump’s attack on Fed Chair Jay Powell shook global markets, sending the dollar lower while boosting gold, Bitcoin, and safe-haven currencies.

articles.title: International Payments in USDC: Challenge to Visa
articles.description: Circle launches a global payments network in USDC, aiming to become a real alternative to Visa and Mastercard in the fintech sector.

articles.title: MicroStrategy Adds 6,556 Bitcoin for $556 Million, Pushing Holdings to 538,200 BTC
Saylor’s Strategy buys 6,556 Bitcoin for $555 million
articles.description: MicroStrategy, now known as Strategy, has announced another Bitcoin purchase, which it made between April 14 and April 20. This brings the company’s total Bitcoin holdings to 538,200 BTC. articles.title: Breaking : MicroStrategy (Strategy) Buys 6,556 Bitcoin for $555.8 Million
articles.description: The post Breaking : MicroStrategy (Strategy) Buys 6,556 Bitcoin for $555. As of April 20, the company has acquired 6,556 BTC for $555. 8 million at an average price of $84,785 per Bitcoin

articles.title: PlanB Criticizes Ethereum as a Centralized Pre-Mined Coin
articles.description: PlanB, a well-known Bitcoin analyst famous for the Stock-to-Flow (S2F) model, recently criticized Ethereum as ETH’s price and dominance have dropped significantly since the beginning of the year. His criticism raises doubts about Ethereum, the second-largest cryptocurrency by market cap, focusing on its core mechanisms, particularly its use of Proof of Stake (PoS) instead of Proof of Work (PoW). articles.title: Ethereum Foundation pivots focus to L1 scaling, frees Vitalik Buterin for research innovation
articles.description: The Ethereum Foundation (EF) is sharpening its focus on improving the Layer 1 network and enhancing the user experience through a series of upcoming protocol upgrades. On April 21, Tomasz Stańczak, the incoming co-director at EF, confirmed that the organization is shifting its research priorities.

articles.title: Solana's PumpSwap DEX Volume Grows
articles.description: Solana's PumpSwap DEX has surged to $3. 45 billion in daily trading volume

articles.title: Vitalik Buterin proposes RISC-V overhaul to revive Ethereum’s execution layer
articles.description: Vitalik Buterin proposes replacing Ethereum's execution layer with RISC-V to improve speed and scalability.
